summary: Full e2e testing of Independent Game Log feature for referees. All 13 test scenarios PASS. Feature is completely functional: Games page tabs, stats, CRUD operations (add/edit/delete), search, type filter, manager privacy, Schedule integration, and Calendar integration all verified.

features_tested.referee_login: PASS — Login via Try Demo Account → Referee. Navigates to /dashboard
features_tested.games_page_two_tabs: PASS — 'Assigned Games' and 'Independent Log' tabs visible only for referee role
features_tested.games_page_stats_4_items: PASS — Assigned Games (5), Independent Games (5), Platform Earnings ($75), Independent Earnings ($405)
features_tested.independent_log_year_summary: PASS — Games in 2026: 5, Earnings in 2026: $405, Top Type: League Game
features_tested.independent_log_5_seeded_games: PASS — All 5 seed games visible: Atlanta Rec Spring League (x2), Metro Playoff Series, Youth Hoops Academy, Fulton County AAU
features_tested.log_game_form_dialog: PASS — Dialog opens with all fields: date, time, org, location, game type (dropdown), fee, notes. Save button disabled without date/org
features_tested.add_new_game: PASS — New game added, stats update to 6 games/$525, toast 'Game logged!' shown
features_tested.edit_game: PASS — Edit dialog pre-filled with correct values, 'Save Changes' button text correct, fee update persists to $95
features_tested.delete_game_with_confirm: PASS — Trash icon opens confirm dialog with Remove/Cancel, Cancel preserves game, Remove deletes and stats update (4 games/$325)
features_tested.search_functionality: PASS — 'Atlanta' search correctly shows 2 games; 'zzz_nonexistent' shows empty state
features_tested.type_filter: PASS — 'Tournament' filter shows 1 game (Fulton County AAU)
features_tested.manager_cannot_see_independent_log: PASS — Manager login shows standard 4 stats (Total Games, Completed, Total Earnings, Avg Rating), no tabs, no independent content
features_tested.schedule_page_independent_section: PASS — My Schedule tab shows 'INDEPENDENT GAMES' divider with all 5 games (org name, type badge, date, location, fee)
features_tested.calendar_purple_events: PASS — Purple events visible on calendar cells (Mar 21: Youth Hoops Academy, Mar 31: Metro Playoff Series, Apr 9 in +1 more)
features_tested.calendar_event_dialog_independent: PASS — Clicking Apr 9 shows event details with 'INDEPENDENT' section showing Atlanta Rec Spring League (League, 09:00, Emory University Gym, $80)

critical_code_review_comments: Calendar cell code shows indie games only if dayGames.length < 2 (correct by design), but this means on busy dates (2+ assigned games) indie games are hidden behind '+N more'. This is consistent/acceptable behavior but worth documenting.

The test_credentials.md file only has email/password but login form requires using 'Try Demo Account' dialog since localStorage needs createDemoAccounts() to seed user data first — direct form login only works after accounts are already seeded.

test_credentials.referee: referee@demo.com / password (via Try Demo Account → Log in as Referee)
test_credentials.manager: manager@demo.com / password (via Try Demo Account → Log in as Manager)

mocked_apis: ALL data MOCKED via localStorage (demoDataService.js). Independent game CRUD via addIndependentGameRecord/updateIndependentGameRecord/deleteIndependentGameRecord in demoDataService.js.
seed_data_creation: 5 independent games seeded in demoDataService.js createSeedStore() under 'independent_games' key. Auto-backfilled by loadStore() if missing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend Vite React app at port 3000. All data via localStorage. Independent Game Log feature (new) fully working. Login must use Try Demo Account → Select Role (not direct email/password) since createDemoAccounts() needs to run first. Games page has two tabs for referee, flat view for manager. Calendar purple events visible on months matching seed dates (Feb, Mar, Apr 2026). Today=April 5 2026. All 13 independent game feature scenarios PASS 100%.
